category_sources: Official bwm-ng homepage describes Bandwidth Monitor NG as a console-based live network and disk I/O bandwidth monitor.
source_facts.description says bwm-ng is a live network and disk I/O bandwidth monitor.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title uses bwm-ng and Bandwidth Monitor NG.
docs_sources: Official bwm-ng homepage is the best available official documentation surface and lists features, platforms, outputs, and downloads.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official homepage lists network/disk inputs, curses/plain/CSV/HTML output, and interface/device monitoring features.
source_facts.description identifies network and disk I/O bandwidth monitoring.
